text: وَ لِلَّهِ‌ مُلْکُ‌ السَّمَاوَاتِ‌ وَ الْأَرْضِ‌ وَ اللَّهُ‌ عَلَى‌ کُلِ‌ شَيْ‌ءٍ قَدِيرٌ

en.ahmedali: For God's is the kingdom of the heavens and the earth, and God's is the power over all things.
en.ahmedraza: And for Allah only is the kingship of the heavens and the earth; and Allah is Able to do all things.
en.arberry: To God belongs the Kingdom of the heavens and of the earth; and God is powerful over everything.
en.daryabadi: Allah's is the dominion of the heavens and the earth. and Allah is over everything Potent.
en.hilali: And to Allah belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth, and Allah has power over all things.
en.itani: To God belongs the sovereignty of the heavens and the earth. God has power over all things.
en.maududi: To Allah belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth; and Allah is All-Powerful. indeed been successful. The life of this world is merely an illusory enjoyment.
en.mubarakpuri: And to Allah belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth, and Allah has power over all things.
en.pickthall: Unto Allah belongeth the Sovereignty of the heavens and the earth. Allah is Able to do all things.
en.qarai: To Allah belongs the kingdom of the heavens and the earth, and Allah has power over all things.
en.qaribullah: To Allah belongs the Kingdom of the heavens and the earth. Allah has Power over all things.
en.sahih: And to Allah belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth, and Allah is over all things competent.
en.sarwar: To God belongs all that is in the heavens and the earth and He has power over all things.
en.shakir: And Allah's is the kingdom of the heavens and the earth, and Allah has power over all things.
en.transliteration: Walillahi mulku alssamawati waalardi waAllahu AAala kulli shayin qadeerun
en.wahiduddin: The kingdom of the heavens and the earth belongs to God; God has power over all things.
en.yusufali: To Allah belongeth the dominion of the heavens and the earth; and Allah hath power over all things.
fa.ansarian: و مالکیّت و فرمانروایی آسمان ها و زمین فقط در سیطره خداست، و خدا بر هر کاری تواناست.
fa.ayati: از آن خداست فرمانروايى آسمانها و زمين و خدا بر هر چيزى تواناست.
fa.bahrampour: و فرمانروايى آسمان‌ها و زمين از آن خداست و خدا بر هر چيزى تواناست
fa.fooladvand: و فرمانروايى آسمانها و زمين از آنِ خداست، و خداوند بر هر چيزى تواناست.
fa.ghomshei: خداست مالک آسمانها و زمین، و خدا بر هر چیز تواناست.
fa.khorramdel: و ملک آسمانها و زمین از آن خدا است، و خدا بر هر چیزی توانا است. [[«مُلْک»: سلطنت و شاهی. کشور.]]
fa.khorramshahi: و فرمانروایی آسمانها و زمین از آن خداوند است و خدا بر هر کاری تواناست‌
fa.makarem: و حکومت آسمانها و زمین، از آن خداست؛ و خدا بر همه چیز تواناست.
fa.moezzi: و خدا را است فرمانروائی آسمانها و زمین و خدا بر هر چیز توانا است‌
fa.mojtabavi: و خداى راست فرمانروايى آسمانها و زمين، و خدا بر همه چيز تواناست.
fa.sadeqi: و فرمانروایی آسمان‌ها و زمین تنها برای خداست. و خدا بر هر چیزی تواناست.
